allow: Bash("C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -e "SELECT ID, post_title, post_type, post_status FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type IN \('product', 'page'\) AND post_status = 'publish' LIMIT 50;":*)

Bash("C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -e "SELECT t.term_id, t.name, t.slug, tt.taxonomy, tt.count FROM wp_terms t JOIN wp_term_taxonomy tt ON t.term_id = tt.term_id WHERE tt.taxonomy IN \(''product_cat'', ''category''\) ORDER BY tt.count DESC LIMIT 30;" tools.minawork)
Bash("C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_products FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type = ''product'' AND post_status = ''publish'';" tools.minawork)
Bash("C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS gardentools CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")

Bash("C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -e "SELECT ''Categories'' as Type, COUNT\(*\) as Total FROM gt_product_menu UNION ALL SELECT ''Products'', COUNT\(*\) FROM gt_product UNION ALL SELECT ''Pages'', COUNT\(*\) FROM gt_page UNION ALL SELECT ''Articles'', COUNT\(*\) FROM gt_article UNION ALL SELECT ''Settings'', COUNT\(*\) FROM gt_constant;" gardentools)

Bash("C:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root gardentools -e "SELECT product_id, LEFT\(name, 30\) as name, image FROM gt_product LIMIT 10;")
